subtopics.title: Understanding Democracy
common_misconceptions: Young people cannot participate in democracy
subtopics.teaching_note: Democracy: government of the people, by the people, for the people (Abraham Lincoln). Features: free and fair elections, rule of law, protection of human rights, freedom of speech. INEC: Independent National Electoral Commission - organizes elections in Nigeria. How young people can participate: join school government, debate current issues, vote when eligible (18+), encourage adults to vote. Democratic institutions: legislature, executive, judiciary, civil society.
